textByHashes.c7565e21db8619f9758cafd28b42fab085d6fcca: Oh, hello! Have you come to see the minotaurs? No one ever comes to see the minotaurs, but they love having guests!
textByHashes.74dbc757b47e3c47a45c969f94a590adfc4c36e6: Of course! Most people are scared of them. It's sad in a way. They're such misunderstood creatures, but they're massive softies once you get to know them!
textByHashes.f0283299d793d8c7b168d1a47630700a74115ecb: You'll find them down in the cave if you want to say hello! They'll be thrilled to see you!
textByHashes.bad7ddefc0ced07d108eeb0dcb45a81ada817912: Oh, hello again! Have you been spending time with the minotaurs? They always love it when people come to visit! Such wonderful creatures...
